# Workspace Guidelines

## Scope
- This workspace contains multiple independent projects in separate top-level folders.
- Each project has its own instructions file in `.github/instructions/` that auto-applies to its folder.
- Do not edit `luchbarbot — копия/` unless explicitly asked — it is a duplicate of `luchbarbot/` kept for reference.
- Before proposing structural changes, first inspect the existing implementation in the touched file and follow its established patterns.
